entries.title: Moved Pixelbox onto a native Zig desktop runtime with Ghostty
entries.summary: Pixelbox now runs through Zig and Zero Native, with Ghostty taking over the terminal surface and a more polished translucent desktop shell replacing the older layered approach.
points: Migrated the active desktop app flow from the older Electron path to a Zig-powered Zero Native runtime
Integrated a native Ghostty terminal panel with titleless macOS chrome and tuned translucent styling
Cleaned up legacy Electron and xterm package usage so the shipped path matches the current product

entries.title: Added agent monitoring, project recovery, and smarter local preview orchestration
entries.summary: Pixelbox moved further from a polished shell into a more durable local software workspace with better visibility into active agents and fewer broken localhost loops.
points: Added an in-app agent monitor for active Codex sessions with backend inspection hooks
Introduced hidden-project restore controls and cleaner project action menus
Improved runtime startup by automatically reassigning colliding localhost ports and injecting the matching PORT environment variable

entries.title: Expanded AI launch flows and native runtime support
entries.summary: Pixelbox gained wider CLI startup coverage plus the ability to manage non-web preview workflows without forcing everything through a browser tab.
points: Added AI Launch presets for Codex, Claude, Gemini, Hermes, OpenClaw TUI, and plain terminal mode
Added native app runtime support with run, capture, and image configuration fields
Added project switching shortcuts and terminal drag-and-drop for faster local workflow control

entries.title: Started the dedicated Pixelbox landing page
entries.summary: Pixelbox now has its own product-facing page instead of living only as a repo or a mention on the personal site.
points: Positioned Pixelbox as a standalone Pixel Claw Labs product
Added a public changelog surface for ongoing release notes
Set up the site to deploy cleanly from a Vercel subdirectory

entries.title: Tightened the local workspace loop
entries.summary: Pixelbox continued shifting from a simple desktop shell into a project-aware software workspace.
points: Project switching and runtime continuity were stabilized
Preview navigation and runtime controls became more reliable
Desktop runtime and Playwright flows expanded to cover long-session behavior
